name: Hit of Chernobyl
short_description: Hit of Chernobyl is a Survival FPS. The action takes place in the Zone, which was heavily polluted after a mysterious disaster. Marauders, journalists and just adventurers began to illegally enter the Zone. Many of them disappeared without a trace, and some lucky ones returned with unique artifacts.
detailed_description:
Hit of Chernobyl is a Survival FPS. The action takes place in the Zone, which was heavily contaminated after a mysterious disaster. Many years later, various marauders, journalists and just adventurers began to illegally enter the Zone. These people began to create organized groups for forays deep into the Zone. Many of them disappeared without a trace, and some lucky ones returned with unique artifacts. The main character is one of these adventurers.

Key features:
  • Open world.
  • Depressive atmosphere.
  • Hunger and thirst.
  • Inventory.
  • Day and night change.
  • Save game by sleeping at home
